text:
Once upon a time, there was a clumsy crow. This crow loved nothing more than spying on birds. One day, it saw a beautiful falcon swooping down. That night, the crow dreamed of capturing that falcon. Poor thing!

When it woke, he had crow feathers and a small net. He hovered over the river every day, hoping for fish. He nearly got snatched!

Then, he saw a squirrel. Maybe it could help? Yes! It climbed up trees together. They gathered nuts.

Later, a hawk chased the squirrel. Wise owl! It flew into his basket.

Feathers got messy. Owl kept secrets well. He learned falcon feathers.

One stormy night, he caught himself fluttering. Rain! Too steep! Down he came...

Next day, owls saw a feather. Maybe.

That feather was mine? Hawk!

No! Owls!

A hawk? Owls laughed! Now I've feathers.

Fly!Fly!Fly!

It dove
